programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: (PG) The ALDC heads to Michigan, where Abby has her three youngest members McKenzie, Tea and Sarah go head-to-head to see who will be competing in a solo at Nationals.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.title: Dance Moms: Episode
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.sub-title: Double the Moms, Double the Trouble
programme.desc: (PG) Abby kicks off the new dance season by bringing back her winning Select Team to compete against her original Elite Team for a rematch in Wheeling, WV.

programme.title: Dance Moms
programme.sub-title: Kiss Or Get Off The Pot
programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.

programme.desc: Young dancers train and compete under a demanding coach while striving for success in elite competitions. Their mothers clash over favoritism, pressure, and their children’s roles within the team. Intense rehearsals, rivalries, and emotional conflicts drive drama on and off the stage.
